PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF & ORDER (SC-100) AS TO DEFT. JOHN CALLAN BY PERSONAL SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUYNH, MILES
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUYNH, MILES AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAN, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARS WITH REPRESENTATIVE/SON BRIAN CALLAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2016 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUYNH, MILES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALLAN, JOHN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
